headline: Old Dominion Freight Line Provides Update for Second Quarter 2026
summary: THOMASVILLE, N.C., June 03, 2026--Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (Nasdaq: ODFL) today reported certain less-than-truckload ("LTL") operating metrics for May 2026. Revenue per day increased 12.3% as compared to May 2025 due to an increase in our LTL revenue per hundredweight that was partially offset by a 3.8% decrease in LTL tons per day.
